name: premium-presentations
description: Generate polished, browser-rendered HTML slide decks with presenter mode, theme assets, export helpers, and offline validation.

interface.longDescription: Generate, edit, validate, bundle, and export self-contained Premium Presentations HTML slide decks with bundled themes, presenter tools, diagrams, speaker notes, and deterministic deck validation.
defaultPrompt: Create a polished HTML deck about this topic
Turn this PR diff into a validated deck
Export this deck to PDF and speaker notes
